# Webspark monorepo split documentation

## Description
The mono-package-split.yml file is a GitHub Actions workflow designed to automate the process of splitting a monorepo into multiple packages. It uses the Symplify "Monorepo Builder" tool and Dan Harrin's "Github Action Monorepo Split" to achieve this.

The workflow is triggered on push events to the main branch OR tagged release push events. It can also be manually triggered via the GitHub Actions interface.

### Link to full documentation
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AhIwQBBgP6Wi5tXXYxzf_3YAgdUd7KB42xFJQlRUT4U/edit?usp=sharing
